====Pokémon====
This listing is of Agatha's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Agatha
|pkmn=Gastly (multiple)
|type1=Ghost
|type2=Poison
|img=Agatha Gastly Adventures.png
|cap=Agatha's Gastly
|epnum=PS049
|epname=As Gastly as Before
|desc={{p|Gastly}} is part of Agatha's Ghost army. They were used to attack the Kanto cities. Agatha also has her own Gastly outside of the army. The Gastly first appears as a dark fog lifting Super Nerd {{adv|Miles}} when he'd been beaten. [[Blue's Charizard]] was able to defeat Gastly by attacking out of nowhere, after which the boy deduces that the same Elite Four member whom he'd fought before was behind the scenes. In said battle, [[Blue's Scyther]] was used to {{m|Slash}} Gastly into pieces.

None of Gastly's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Agatha
|pkmn=Haunter (multiple)
|type1=Ghost
|type2=Poison
|img=Agatha Haunter Adventures.png
|cap=Agatha's Haunter
|epnum=PS050
|epname=Lapras Lazily
|desc=Agatha stole many {{p|Haunter}}, both wild and [[Camper (Trainer class)#Haunter|Trainer-owned]], and used them to attack the cities of [[Kanto]].

None of Haunter's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Arbok 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Agatha
|pkmn=Arbok
|type1=Poison
|img=Agatha Arbok Adventures.png
|epnum=PS052
|epname=Growing Out of Gengar
|desc={{p|Arbok}} was sent out to battle Koga and Blue as it was their goal to try to defeat Agatha. Agatha's Arbok has several abilities activated by Agatha changing the patterns on its abdomen, including the speed-boosting pattern, the attack boosting pattern, and the invulnerability pattern that repels poisons. However, its ability was nullified when its body was smeared with blood.

Arbok's known moves are {{m|Wrap}}, {{m|Leer}}, {{m|Rock Slide}}, {{m|Body Slam}}, {{m|Bite}}, {{m|Bind}}{{tt|*|Arbok could not legally learn Bind at the time}}, {{m|Poison Sting}}, and {{m|Haze}}{{tt|*|revealed on an official site only}}.}}

{{anchor|Golbat 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Agatha
|pkmn=Golbat
|type1=Poison
|type2=Flying
|img=Agatha Golbat Adventures.png
|epnum=PS052
|epname=Growing Out of Gengar
|desc={{p|Golbat}} was another Pokémon sent out to battle against Koga and Blue.

Golbat's only known move is {{m|Supersonic}}.}}
